assessment_objectives.objective: the context for the intended purpose(s) for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) is clearly documented.

the context for the proposed deployment setting(s) for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) is clearly documented.
